item.title: Line Cooks FTW!
item.description: I sadly don't know the sauce. EDIT: Its Friday Frontpage! Thanks a lot, Imgurians! I do reviews as a hobby, and this week, I've tackled the newest James Bond game, 007 First Light, and there was a really bizarre shift in storytelling... You can check the review here: https://youtu.be/qkavQjbCzsw

item.description:
1

19
20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @legendof7essa was away from their cat for a month, so painted all these! So cute. *Nominated by @SpeedbumpNZ
27 Man Tax: Aaron Stanford
"Has it ever struck you that life is all memory, except for the one present moment that goes by you so quick you hardly catch it going?" - Tennessee Williams So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, **Imgur Creator Spotlight is now in your hands!! Having trouble finding people I haven't already featured recently. Now I'm going to just do who YOU nominate. Tag me or DM me and I'll feature whoever you pick.*
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: A raccoon figured out that if he blocks the drive-thru, they’ll give him a donut to make him leave.
item.dc:creator: kenistod

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1715 (void-desert)
item.description:
Let's get this bread
When I relax bad things happen. Same when I do nice things for myself.
It's been years since anything like this happened to me.
Mine isn't saying anything right now, but he is perched atop my phone preening.
This Fairy Wren has taken a bath.
This would be amazing
Pippin tax (and Princess Monster Truck cameo) Today's message from Pippin: "pippin." ___
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: GovBrief Today #497
item.description: Postal Service leaders proposed a rule letting them refuse to deliver your ballot if your state won't give Trump its voter rolls. States would enroll their mail voters in a new federal portal, and ballot envelopes that your county mails to you never arrives. Letter carriers' union leaders are concerned, and their president says the draft means the Postal Service would simply refuse a noncompliant state's election mail. Trump spent Thursday in the Oval Office threatening to take back Washington and run it federally if voters in Tuesday's primary nominate a mayoral candidate he doesn't like. The postal rule and his threat make the same demand: your elections run on his approval. The Constitution requires states to run elections. It gives the president no role at all. I've emailed 7,786 stories over 497 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260611-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/8647-mall [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-june11 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/ala-abortion-election [4] https://go.govbrief.today/alaska-telehealth-ban [5] https://go.govbrief.today/epa-block-grant [6] https://go.govbrief.today/nsf-alaska [7] https://go.govbrief.today/ohio-photoid [8] https://go.govbrief.today/usps-ballots [9] https://go.govbrief.today/dc-threat [10] https://go.govbrief.today/havana-syndrome [11] https://go.govbrief.today/cutler-nomination [12] https://go.govbrief.today/paxton-actblue [13] https://go.govbrief.today/childcare-upheld [14] https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-nitrogen [15] https://go.govbrief.today/boelter-plea [16] https://go.govbrief.today/judge-asylum-ruling [17] https://go.govbrief.today/la-housing [18] https://go.govbrief.today/expunge-impeach [19] https://go.govbrief.today/kenctr-appeal [20] https://go.govbrief.today/lander-cleared Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
